goal: Turn a platformer idea, side-scroller brief, metroidvania-flavored sketch, or character-action reference pack into a polished browser slice with strong movement, readable jumps, convincing recovery, and a screenshot-ready main screen.

primaryMapping.useWhen: The user wants a broad adventure platformer, a readable route through landmarks, or a collectible-first side-scrolling slice.

alternativeMappings.useWhen: The ask is about exact jumps, Celeste-like recovery beats, chapter climbs, or a more demanding traversal fantasy.
The ask leans more into patrol pressure, ranged threats, blasters, or action-platformer combat pockets.

forgivenessRules: bias toward cleaner landings instead of harsh edge drops
keep restart speed high if the route is precision-heavy
avoid cluttering the jump arc with UI or VFX noise

cameraAndScreen.composition: Show the next landing zone, the next hazard, and enough parallax to feel premium without hiding gameplay reads.
cameraAndScreen.mainScreenGoal: The first playable screen should survive as an app-store screenshot or a five-second trailer clip.

core: move through a readable sequence of jumps and landmarks
collect or secure a clear route objective
finish the slice with one memorable traversal beat
chapterShape: final payoff jump, relic, or exit gate

assetShotList: hero idle, run, jump, fall, land, action, and recovery family
enemy or hazard family with strong silhouette separation
platform tile kit and landmark prop kit
pickup, checkpoint, exit gate, and route-signaling surfaces
landing dust, jump trail, hit sparks, and recovery feedback
HUD plate, collectible badge, fail surface, and chapter clear surface

artDirection.look: bold silhouettes, strong foreground-midground-background separation, cinematic but readable color hierarchy
artDirection.ui: small but premium, aligned away from jump arcs and hazard reads
artDirection.fx: landing dust, recoil, route guidance, and completion payoffs should feel intentional rather than noisy

playtestFocus: is the character fun to control before more content is added
does the camera show the next decision early enough
do the sprites and platform kit hold together as one product family
approximationNotes: If the user asks for a full metroidvania, world map, ability tree, or boss pipeline, keep the first slice focused on one route and one hero verb set.
Do not fake breadth before the base movement is presentable.
